responsibilities: • advise on international tax planning and structuring   • handle transfer pricing documentation and compliance   • manage cross -border tax filings and reporting   • support double taxation avoidance and treaty benefits   • assist in global  tax audits and disputes   • monitor global tax law changes (beps, oecd guidelines)
qualifications: • ca with specialization in international taxation   • strong understanding of dtaa, transfer pricing, and beps   • research and advisory skills
